---
title:  Benefits Cliff Estimator Notebook
author: Fitz Koch
date: today
description: Working through the benefits cliff estimator logic in python code 
format: 
  html:
    html-math-method: mathjax
    fig-responsive: true
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    theme: cosmo
    page-layout: full
  ipynb:
    wrap: none
execute: 
  cache: true
editor:
    render-on-save: true
bibliography: /home/fitsl/library/zotero/fjk_library.bib
---

```{python}
import sys, os
from pathlib import Path

_project_root = Path.cwd()
while not (_project_root / "src").exists():
    _project_root = _project_root.parent
os.chdir(_project_root)
```
